heading: GoodsTypeCode
text: A code that indicates the type of goods (especially hazardous goods) that is carried by a vehicle.

heading: EmissionLevelCode
text: A code that indicates the emission level of a vehicle.

heading: VehicleTypeCode
text: A code that indicates the type of vehicle.

heading: LoadTypeCode
text: A code that indicates categories of load types that can affect the applicability of a regulation.

heading: VehicleEquipmentCode
text: A code that indicates the type of equipment that is carried by a vehicle.

heading: FuelTypeCode
text: A code that indicates the type of fuel that is used by a vehicle.

heading: VehicleUsageCode
text: A code that indicates the usage of a vehicle.

heading: VehicleCharacteristics
text: Characteristics of a vehicle.

heading: hasFuelType
text: Indicates the type of fuel that is used by the vehicle.

heading: hasGoodsType
text: Indicates the type of goods (especially hazardous goods) being carried by the vehicle.

heading: hasGrossMass
text: Current mass of the vehicle including passengers and cargo.

heading: hasHeaviestAxleMass
text: Mass of the heaviest axle of the vehicle.

heading: hasHeight
text: Height of the vehicle.

heading: hasKerbMass
text: Mass of the vehicle ready to drive without passengers or cargo.

heading: hasLength
text: Length of the vehicle, including the length of any trailers, couplings, embedded features etc..

heading: hasLoadType
text: Indicates any loading anomalies associated with the vehicle.

heading: hasMaximumAllowedMass
text: Maximum mass of the vehicle including passengers and cargo.

heading: hasNumberOfAxles
text: Number of axles of the vehicle.

heading: hasVehicleEquipment
text: Indicates the equipment that is carried by the vehicle.

heading: hasVehicleUsage
text: Indicates the usage of the vehicle.

heading: hasVehicleType
text: Indicates the type of the vehicle.

heading: hasWidth
text: Width of the vehicle, including any features embedded or fixed on it, in metres.

heading: yearOfFirstRegistration
text: Indicates the year of the first registration of the vehicle.
